from __future__ import annotations


def emit(metric: str, value: int) -> tuple[str, int]:
    return metric, value


def prometheus_or_statsd_metric_emitted_inside_db_result_loop_positive(rows: list[dict[str, object]]) -> list[tuple[str, int]]:
    emitted: list[tuple[str, int]] = []
    for _row in rows:
        emitted.append(emit("db.row_seen", 1))
    return emitted
